mapper.select: select locationId,address,longitude,latitude from location where LOWER(address) = LOWER(#{address})

select locationId,address,longitude,latitude from location
WHERE ABS(longitude - #{longitude}) < 1 AND ABS(latitude - #{latitude}) < 1

select ltd.locationId,ltd.locationDate,ltd.uvId,ltd.uvIndex, uw.uvLevel, uw.timeToDamage, uw.description from locationTimeDetails ltd join uvWarning uw on ltd.uvId = uw.uvId where locationId = #{locationId} and DATE(locationDate) = DATE(#{locationDate})
select c.clothId, c.clothName, c.description, c.tag from clothRecommend cr join clothing c on cr.clothId = c.clothId where uvId = #{uvId}
select p.description from protectionRecommend pr join protectionTip p on pr.protectionId = p.protectionId where uvId = #{uvId}
